Nubra Valley.how_to_apply: Online at https://www.lahdclehpermit.in or at DC Office, Leh
Nubra Valley.processing_time: 1-3 hours online, same day at DC Office
Nubra Valley.notes: Required to cross Khardung La. Carry printout + original ID proof.

Pangong Lake.how_to_apply: Online at https://www.lahdclehpermit.in or at DC Office, Leh
Pangong Lake.processing_time: 1-3 hours online, same day at DC Office
Pangong Lake.notes: No camping directly on lake shore. Use designated camping sites.

Tso Moriri.how_to_apply: Online at https://www.lahdclehpermit.in or at DC Office, Leh
Tso Moriri.processing_time: 1-3 hours online, same day at DC Office
Tso Moriri.notes: More remote than Pangong. Limited facilities. Carry supplies.

Zanskar.how_to_apply: Online at https://www.lahdclehpermit.in or at DC Office, Leh
Zanskar.processing_time: 1-3 hours online, same day at DC Office
Zanskar.notes: Very remote. Road access limited to summer months. Chadar Trek requires separate permits.

Leh City.permit_required: No permit needed for Leh city itself
Leh City.how_to_apply: N/A — no permit for Leh city
Leh City.notes: Inner Line Permit is only needed when traveling outside Leh city to restricted areas.

Siachen Base Camp.how_to_apply: Through registered travel agents in Leh only
Siachen Base Camp.notes: Limited to Indian nationals. Subject to Army approval. Not always available.

Hanle.how_to_apply: Online at https://www.lahdclehpermit.in or at DC Office, Leh
Hanle.notes: Home to the Indian Astronomical Observatory. Very remote, limited accommodation.
